description_long: This object consists of two floor-standing electric fans positioned side by side, each with a circular protective grille and four broad, petal-shaped blades. The left fan is predominantly black, while the right fan features a blue color scheme, both with metallic accents on the base and grille. The fans have cylindrical motor housings mounted on vertical poles, which are supported by cross-shaped, four-legged bases for stability. The protective grilles are made of thin, evenly spaced metal rods radiating from a central hub, providing safety while allowing airflow. The central hub of each fan is labeled, and the fans appear to be constructed primarily from plastic and metal, with visible screws and joints. No power cords or control panels are visible, suggesting a minimalistic design or that these elements are located on the reverse side.
description: A pair of floor-standing electric fans with circular metal grilles, petal-shaped blades, and cross-shaped bases, one in black and one in blue. Both fans have a modern, sturdy appearance with metallic and plastic components.
description_view_0: Front view showing both fans' circular grilles, petal-shaped blades (black on the left, blue on the right), and labeled central hubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical motor housings, the depth of the fan blades, and the cross-shaped bases.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the fan housings, the support poles, and the structure of the bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the fans, the thickness of the blades, and the alignment of the bases.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard consists of a circular metal grille with evenly spaced radial rods and a central hub, providing both protection and visibility of the blades.
